title: Security: Chrome for Android Hide Entering Fullscreen Notification Toast using Multiple Toast from Failed to Copy

description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
I noticed on Android 11 after Chrome failed to copy text from the webpage it will show toast "Failed to copy to the clipboard".  
  
When combined with requestFullScreen the "Failed to copy to the clipboard" toast will be shown first then after few seconds the entering f
